title: Evidence Bundle gate-result predicate (v1)
description: JSON Schema for the predicate body of an in-toto Statement v1 whose predicateType is https://evals.intentsolutions.io/gate-result/v1. This schema validates ONLY the predicate body. The enclosing in-toto Statement envelope (_type, subject, predicateType) is validated separately against the in-toto Statement v1 schema.

gate_id.description: Pipeline-hop-qualified gate identifier. MUST match the subject[].name entry in the enclosing in-toto Statement and MUST match the regex tool:side:gate-id per SPEC.md § 6 R8.

result.description: Verdict for this gate execution. See SPEC.md § 5 R6 for semantics.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 of the policy file the gate evaluated against, prefixed sha256:.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 of the input artifact the gate evaluated. MUST match subject[].digest.sha256 in the enclosing Statement (SPEC.md § 6 R9).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp. Moment the gate emitted the result.

runner.description: Tool + semver identifier that produced the row.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA the gate evaluated against. Full 40-hex or short 7-hex accepted.

metadata.description: Free-form tool-specific metadata. Consumers MUST NOT rely on metadata fields for ship/no-ship decisions; metadata is informative only.

failure_mode.description: When result is FAIL, an identifier classifying the failure shape. Refer to the originating tool's documentation for the value space.

advisory_severity.description: When result is ADVISORY, the severity tier.
